description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a long, streamlined barrel and a robust, angular receiver. The body is predominantly dark, with subtle highlights and a matte finish, suggesting a metal or composite construction. The stock is compact and angular, with a pistol grip and an integrated shoulder rest, providing ergonomic support for the user. The fore-end appears reinforced, with visible mechanical details and a possible pump mechanism beneath the barrel. The trigger guard is pronounced and angular, offering protection and a secure grip. Overall, the shotgun exudes a modern, high-tech aesthetic suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A sleek, modern shotgun with a long barrel, angular stock, and tactical features, finished in a dark matte color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, tapered barrel and the symmetrical alignment of the shotgun's body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the barrel, the angular stock, pistol grip, and detailed receiver with visible mechanical components.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the compact stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same elongated barrel and tactical stock, with additional details of the fore-end and mechanical parts.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and streamlined with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: pistol grip with integrated shoulder rest
attribute_trigger_guard_design: angular, elongated trigger guard with a squared profile and reinforced edges
